name: memory-engine-v2
description: OpenClaw 3.8+ 智能上下文管理与记忆系统插件

scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run copy-deps && npm run copy-manifest
scripts.copy-deps:
xcopy /E /I /Y node_modules etter-sqlite3 dist
ode_modules etter-sqlite3 2>nul & xcopy /E /I /Y node_modules indings dist
ode_modules indings 2>nul & xcopy /E /I /Y node_modules\onnxruntime-node dist
ode_modules\onnxruntime-node 2>nul
scripts.copy-manifest: copy /Y openclaw.plugin.json dist\openclaw.plugin.json && copy /Y package.json dist\package.json
